steps.t: Horn and Corudan are in the town of Forlaw, in Wildermore. Gléowine wants to visit Dunfast, the village in which he was born, to see how it has been a…
The village of Dunfast is located in the middle of the Whitshaws, in Wildermore. Horn and Corudan agree that you should all journey to Gléowine's home…
Gléowine is outside the village of Dunfast, in the Whitshaws. Little moves among the houses of Dunfast, and Gléowine is very worried.
Horn is waiting to speak with you outside Dunfast. Nona reappeared again, but the reunion did not proceed as Horn wished. He is waiting to speak with …
